expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: missing scenario generation for template-save and report-builder loading
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly covers both missing scenario areas: it states Phase 4a must generate missing coverage for "1. template-save / template creation save behavior" and "2. report-builder loading (double-click → elements load/interactivity)" and then provides dedicated sections "Focus area A — Missing scenario generation for template-save" and "Focus area B — Missing scenario generation for report-builder loading" with scenario examples and defect references (e.g., BCIN-7667/BCIN-7669 and BCIN-7727).

expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md is framed around Phase 4a throughout: it declares "Primary phase under test: Phase 4a" and includes a section "Phase 4a alignment (what Phase 4a must produce)" citing "references/phase4a-contract.md" and emphasizing Phase 4a requirements like "subcategory-only" scenarios, "atomic step chain" structure, and "explicit observable verification leaves". It also explains "Why this benchmark is Phase 4a-specific" tying the misses to Phase 4a responsibilities.
